summary: Ran targeted regression for Mobile Preview routing + Expo APK workflow config. Backend/public route checks pass, but camera deep-link remains broken: both direct /mobile/camera and iframe Camera Translate flow still render Unmatched Route.

ui_bugs.issue: After Get Started and selecting Camera Translate, iframe renders Unmatched Route instead of camera screen.

integration_issues.flow: Mobile Preview -> Get Started -> Camera Translate
integration_issues.issue: Camera route mapping is still invalid in deployed Expo web export/base path; deep-link resolves to unmatched route.

action_items: Fix Expo web routing/deep-link handling so /mobile/camera resolves to the camera screen in production static hosting.
Rebuild and redeploy web export for mobile bundle after route fix, then retest iframe Camera Translate flow.
After route fix, re-run mobile preview e2e plus direct /mobile and /mobile/camera checks.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/public/mobile/index.html and MobilePreview.js are correctly wired to /mobile/, so failure is downstream route-resolution in deployed Expo web build, not admin iframe embedding.
GitHub workflow yaml is structurally valid for required triggers (push main + workflow_dispatch) and runs both EAS profiles via EXPO_TOKEN.
eas.json includes both required profiles (preview and production-apk) with android buildType apk.

success_rate.frontend: 60% (3/5 requested checks passed; camera-route related checks failed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Use admin creds from /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Repro in 2 ways: (1) login -> /mobile-preview -> iframe Get Started -> Camera Translate, (2) open https://linen-wolf-239815.hostingersite.com/mobile/camera. Both currently show Unmatched Route. Backend regression file already added at /app/backend/tests/test_mobile_preview_regression.py.
rca of the issue: RCA: camera deep-link route is not resolving under deployed /mobile static hosting context. Root/index route (/mobile/) works, but nested camera path fails consistently both direct and via in-app navigation, indicating export/base path/router mismatch in deployed Expo web artifact rather than admin-page iframe code.
